stimulus: Researchers studying chemoreception have proposed why certain deep-sea octopuses in trenches near New Zealand swim toward chemical plumes that surface-dwelling octopuses ignore when hunting for ______blank at the surface, prey items emit dilute scent trails, but in the cold, high-pressure trenches the same compounds linger long enough to guide a predator over considerable distances.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice D is the best answer. The text before the blank is an independent clause, and what follows is an elaboration that explains the contrast. A colon correctly introduces this elaboration.

Choice A is incorrect because it produces a run-on. Choice B is incorrect because it produces a comma splice between two independent clauses. Choice C is incorrect because "while" introduces a subordinator that does not fit the contrastive structure ("at the surface…but in the cold…trenches") and leaves the sentence incomplete.
